title: Splitsvilla
subTitle: Young men and women go through various obstacles, challenges, and intense heartbreaks to find their perfect partner.

title: Night Out
subTitle: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits to sing along to are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Roadies Real Heroes
subTitle: Gang leader Neha seizes the opportunity to recruit Tara into her team ahead of Prince. Later, Prince vents his frustration to Ranvijay.

title: Roadies
subTitle: The contestants travel to Menindee for the first task which involves forming a team. They jump into a stream and brave torrents of water to get flags. The next day, the losers get in the ring with professional wrestlers and try to hold their ground.

title: MTV Chillax
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the melodious and soulful songs, composed by various talented artists, is played back-to-back.

subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of energetic and popular songs performed by various renowned artists and musicians, played back to back.

subTitle: In the first money round, the contestants have to defend goals in ice penalty shoot-out for a bigger final pot. The next day, the contestants have to capture flags in the race for immunity. Who will secure their spot to be on their way to Sydney?
